summary: hydrateImages checks the SQLite coin_images cache before falling through to the API; matches hydrateFacts's pattern.
reason: Without the SQLite short-circuit, the pre-flight quota gate's image-cache probe (countOrderHydrateImageHits) could under-count live calls when SQLite has a row but the HTTP file cache has aged out (5-min TTL). A large order with cached images on disk but a stale HTTP cache would silently exceed the daily quota. Greptile P1 finding on PR #630 (review 3).
